### Previous: [Changelog 3.1.1](3.1.1.html)

# [Sky-runtime](https://omega.gg/Sky-runtime)
---

## [Sky changelog 3.1.2](https://omega.gg/Sky/changes/3.1.2.html)

## Overview

This release adds qml(s) functions and src support to ControllerCore, updates PageScript layouts,
renames run scripts with a sky- prefix and adds sky-3d, introduces a new bash/sky deploy script,
updates python to 3.14.2, and adds QtQuick3D support.


## Core

- ControllerCore: Create qml(s) functions.

- ControllerCore: Add src support.

- ControllerCore: Update loadData function.

- ControllerCore: Change home to skz.

- ControllerCore: Update to urlIsSkz.


## Content

- PageScript: Update.

- PageScriptDefault: Update.

- PanelInstall: Update.

- Gui: Update turbopixel.


## run

- Rename scripts with sky- prefix.

- Create sky-3d.


## bash

- Create sky deploy script.

- Update python to 3.14.2.

- Update README(s).


## deploy

- Add source.

- Add QtQuick3D.
